channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Canada's Royal Canadian Navy Faces Challenges Keeping Aging Submarines Operational
item.description: The Royal Canadian Navy (RCN) is set to extend the operational life of its aging Victoria-class submarines, acquired from Britain in the late 1990s, for at least another decade. These submarines, plag...

item.title: House Prosecutor Joel Chua Addresses Alleged Threats from Sara Duterte During Impeachment Trial
item.description: House prosecutor and Manila Rep. Joel Chua claimed he arranged for personal security following controversial remarks by Vice President Sara Duterte during her impeachment trial in 2024. Chua stated th...

item.title: Conor McGregor's 69-second defeat nets him KSh 4.136 billion despite loss
item.description: Conor McGregor, the Irish UFC superstar, suffered a first-round TKO defeat to Max Holloway in just 69 seconds at UFC 329. Despite the loss, McGregor earned an estimated KSh 4.136 billion, making him t...

item.title: TCA Caravans T20 Cup Boosts Tanzania Cricket Development
item.description: The Petrofuel TCA Caravans T20 Cup 2026 is becoming a vital platform for Tanzania's cricket growth, offering players regular competitive matches to refine skills and gain experience. The tournament ha...

item.title: Renoir’s 'Pink and Blue' Portraits Reflect Tragedy of WWII
item.description: Catherine Ostler’s book 'The Renoir Girls' recontextualizes the iconic impressionist painting of two young sisters, linking its vibrant pastel hues to the darker realities of 20th-century history. The...

item.title: Jannik Sinner retains Wimbledon title with victory over Zverev
item.description: Jannik Sinner, the Italian tennis star, successfully defended his Wimbledon title by defeating Alexander Zverev in a thrilling five-set final on July 12, 2026. The match, held at Centre Court, saw Sin...

item.title: Shein Advances Hong Kong IPO After Regulatory Approval
item.description: Shein, the fast-fashion e-commerce giant, has made progress in its long-awaited initial public offering (IPO) in Hong Kong after securing regulatory approval. The company, which has faced scrutiny ove...

item.title: Tanzania's 12-member team set for Commonwealth Games in Glasgow
item.description: Tanzania has officially announced its 12-member squad for the 2026 Commonwealth Games in Glasgow, Scotland. The team includes athletes from various disciplines such as athletics, boxing, judo, and swi...

item.title: NBI acknowledges date errors in subpoena and affidavit presented during Sara Duterte impeachment trial
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) admitted during the fourth day of Vice President Sara Duterte's impeachment trial that typographical errors were present in both the subpoena and affidavit o...

item.title: New Rule Threatens Health Insurance for Agricultural Workers
item.description: The article discusses a proposed regulation that could strip agricultural workers of their health insurance benefits, raising concerns about labor rights and healthcare access. The policy, which aims ...

item.title: Concerns over elderly being charged for unused services and rising costs in social care
item.description: The article critiques the practice of charging elderly individuals for services they cannot utilise, raising questions about the ethics of profiting from essential social services. It highlights growi...

item.title: CDF Munir holds strategic meetings with Turkish military and political leaders during official visit
item.description: Chief of Defence Forces (CDF) and Chief of the Army Staff (COAS) Field Marshal Asim Munir concluded a two-day official visit to Turkiye, during which he engaged in critical discussions with Turkish mi...

item.title: 121 Suspects Arrested in Joint Operation to Combat Illegal Mining in Gauteng
item.description: A joint operation between the South African National Defence Force (SANDF) and South African Police Service (SAPS), codenamed *Operation PROSPER*, resulted in the arrest of 121 suspects and the seizur...

item.title: Andy Serkis' Adaptation of 'Animal Farm' Sparks Cultural Debate Over Fart Jokes and Orwellian Themes
item.description: Andy Serkis, renowned for his motion-capture roles in 'Lord of the Rings' and 'Planet of the Apes', has faced significant controversy for his adaptation of George Orwell's 'Animal Farm', which incorpo...

item.title: Kenyan Woman's Financial Struggles in Germany After 20 Years
item.description: Maggy Mukuni, a Kenyan woman who has lived in Germany for two decades, has faced financial challenges that prevent her from investing in her home country. Despite common perceptions that living abroad...

item.title: Chinese National Accused of Leading Fentanyl Trafficking Network in Mexico
item.description: A 39-year-old Chinese national, Zhang Zhidong, known as 'Brother Wang' in criminal circles, is accused of orchestrating a vast fentanyl trafficking network linking Chinese chemical manufacturers to Me...

item.title: Four Employees Convicted in R800,000 Burial Fund Fraud Scheme
item.description: Four former employees of the Thuso Fund Burial Society in the Eastern Cape were convicted of fraud after stealing R800,000 from their employer. The Mthatha Specialised Commercial Crimes Court sentence...

item.title: US strikes in southwestern Iran kill two people
item.description: The article reports that US military strikes killed two individuals and injured three others in southwestern Iran's Khuzestan province, near the borders with Kuwait and Iraq. According to Iranian news...

item.title: MG Unveils Cyber and GO! Electric Concepts for Future SUVs and Hatchbacks
item.description: MG has unveiled two new electric concept cars at the Goodwood Festival of Speed, showcasing its future design direction for SUVs and hatchbacks. The MG Cyber Concept previews a potential future model ...

item.title: Senegal Fires Coach Pape Thiaw After Poor Results, Seeks New Leader
item.description: The Senegalese Football Federation has dismissed head coach Pape Thiaw after his brief tenure with the national team failed to deliver expected results. Thiaw, who took charge recently, faced mounting...
